meaning: n.(汽车、火车、飞机等上的)同座乘客
examples: Her kinetic passion, her chatty-seatmate prose, and her detail-heckling made her a pop-culture oracle in an era that desperately needed one.
As we prepare to land, my seatmate neatly tucks the little device away into his shoulder bag like it was a paperback book.
My seatmate Victor Perez, a Bronx makeup artist and audience regular, came armed with his laptop and used the breaks to look for jobs.
